heroSection.slogan: Plan your trip, share it, and inspire dreams with Moving.com
heroSection.fullSlogan: The platform that connects travel agencies and travelers for a smooth and secure booking experience.

customerSection.title: For Travelers
customerSection.slogan: Discover a new way to book your trips, simple, secure, and flexible.
customerSection.freeSearchText: Quickly find trips that match your criteria with our search engine.
customerSection.flexiblePaymentText: Pay partially or in full according to your budget, with secure payment options via Orange Money and Mobile Money.
customerSection.reservationManagementText: Book one or more seats, cancel or modify your reservations easily from your personal space.

statisticSection.title: Analytics and Statistics
statisticSection.slogan: Track the performance of your trips with detailed statistics and real-time analytics.
statisticSection.followUpReservationText: View the number of bookings per trip, by period and by destination. Identify your most popular trips.
statisticSection.cancellationAnalyticsText: Track cancellation rates and understand the reasons to improve your offers and reduce future cancellations.
statisticSection.commerceCustomText: Generate custom reports over a given period to analyze your performance and make informed decisions.

featureSection.title: Key features
featureSection.financialManagementDescription: Track your revenue, manage partial and full payments, and offer flexible payment options to your clients.
featureSection.integratedChatDescription: Communicate directly with your customers via our integrated chat system to answer their questions and finalize details.
featureSection.reviewSystemDescription: Receive reviews from your customers and build your reputation. Positive reviews will help attract more travelers.
featureSection.couponsAndPromotionsDescription: Create discount coupons and promotional offers to boost sales during slow periods.
featureSection.advancedSecurityDescription: Protect your data and your customers’ data with our advanced security system and secure payments.
featureSection.intuitiveInterfaceDescription: Enjoy an intuitive and easy-to-use user interface designed to simplify trip management.

agencySection.title: For Travel Agencies
agencySection.slogan: Moving.com offers travel agencies a complete platform to manage their operations and grow their customer base.

planning.title: Trip Planning
planning.description: Easily create and plan your trips with our intuitive interface. Set dates, routes, prices, and availability in just a few clicks.

publishing.title: Publishing and Management
publishing.description: Publish your trips to make them visible to potential clients. Edit or cancel trips anytime according to your needs.

tickets.title: Ticket Management
tickets.description: Create and manage tickets for your trips. Offer discount coupons to attract more customers and build loyalty.

visibility.title: International Visibility
visibility.description: Reach customers from around the world

CTASection.title: Ready to simplify your trips and bookings?
CTASection.slogan: Join Moving.com today and discover a new, easier, and more enjoyable way to manage your travels.

footer.slogan: The platform that connects travel agencies and travelers for a smooth and secure booking experience.
